intent: In-game smoke-test gate for Phase 8 (DayNightCycle). Full checklist: docs/smoke-test-phase8.md

steps.intent: DayNightCycle=false with prior phases on. Capture with `wsm3d screenshot phase 8 -Name before` (see docs/smoke-test-phase8.md).
DayNightCycle=true, same scene and camera. Capture with `wsm3d screenshot phase 8 -Name after` (docs/smoke-test-phase8.md).
Sky color cycle closeup (dawn/noon/dusk). Capture with `wsm3d screenshot phase 8 -Name day-night` (docs/smoke-test-phase8.md).
